texto: Hurry means that we gather impressions but have no experiences, that we collect acquaintances but make no friends, that we attend meetings but experience no encounter. We must recover eternity if we are to find time, and eternity is what Jesus came to restore. For without it, there can be no charity.
explicacao: Orientação direta de D.T. Niles sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Hurry means that we gather impressions but have no experiences, that we collect acquaintances but…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, christian, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e termino.
